Advances the game to the next turn, updating the current player and handling end-of-game logic.

NormalBack - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
The NormalBack class represents the back face of a ResourceCard or GoldCard.
NormalBack(int, Content[], Content, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.NormalBack
Constructs a new NormalBack with the specified values.
NormalCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
The NormalCard class is an abstract class representing a playable card with a NormalBack back face.
NormalCard(int, NormalBack) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.NormalCard
Constructs a new NormalCard instance with the specified parameters.
NormalFace - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
The NormalFace class represents the front face of a ResourceCard or the back face of a StarterCard.
NormalFace(int, int, Content[], String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.NormalFace
Constructs a new NormalFace with the specified values.
NotEnoughResourcesException - Exception Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions
Exception thrown when there are not enough resources in the playground as required by the card.
NotEnoughResourcesException(String) - Constructor for exception class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Exceptions.NotEnoughResourcesException
Constructs a new NotEnoughResourcesException with the specified detail message.

NotStructuredObjectiveCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
